title: Muse Spark 1.1 is now available on AI Gateway
summary: Muse Spark 1.1 is now available on AI Gateway
whyItMatters: Muse Spark 1.1 from Meta is now available on AI Gateway . It is a multimodal reasoning model with a 1M token context window built for agentic tasks, accepting text, image, video, PDF, and audio inputs. Muse Spark 1.1 plans and orchestrates work across tools and services, operating as a main agent or as a subagent, and it works with new tools, MCP servers, a…
